profile.name: Fran Rom
profile.title: Frontend Engineer | Web3 & AI
profile.summary: Frontend Lead Engineer with 8+ years of experience building Web3 products and leading engineering teams. Passionate about the intersection of blockchain and AI — from building onchain dapps to integrating AI-powered features like natural language interfaces and autonomous agents into real products. Stack includes TypeScript, React, Next.js, wagmi, viem, Solana, and EVM integrations, as well as AI tooling and agentic workflows.

experience.description: Led frontend engineering for a Web3 gaming platform, building tools and dapps for game developers.
highlights: Built and led a team of 3 frontend engineers to deliver a multitenant questing platform with NFTs and a progression system
Evolved the platform from PaaS to SaaS model, including auth layer, billing integration, and tenant isolation
Architected and developed Web3 tools and prototypes using Next.js, Vite, wagmi, and viem — including crypto games, game developer tooling, and onchain dashboards
Integrated AI-powered features to improve dapp usability: natural language interfaces, AI agents, and in-app action execution via chat

experience.description: R&D team building Web3 prototypes for a leading crypto media company.
highlights: Part of the Research & Development team
Created Web3-based prototypes

experience.description: Built multi-chain dapps across EVM and Solana — game launchers, dashboards, and a Web3 launchpad.
highlights: Built a game launcher embedded with Electron and game dashboards for managing tokens and NFTs across EVM and Solana
Developed a Web3 launchpad with multi-chain wallet connections
NFT collection minting interfaces on both EVM and Solana
Implemented staking, farming, and DeFi features with multi-chain support
Handled multi-chain wallet connections across all products

experience.description: Built DeFi platform interfaces with blockchain data integration.
highlights: Created and maintained Subgraph from blockchain data using The Graph
Built Defi.finance v2 platform

experience.description: Co-founded and led frontend development for a DAO building Yield DeFi projects. Reached $1M in Total Value Locked on mainnet.
highlights: Built two Yield DeFi platforms for a DAO, reaching $1M TVL on mainnet
Ran the project for 2 years as frontend lead and DAO contributor
Used coding standards from Pancakeswap and Beefy for vault architecture
Hands-on with smart contract interaction, staking mechanics, and yield strategies

experience.description: Developed and maintained a children's learning app with React Native.
highlights: Feature, Performance, Polishing, and Bug ownership
React Native animations
App Release process in App Store and Play Store
Worked closely with UX and designers to translate static designs into code
Built components library with Storybook
Ensured cross-platform optimization for mobile phones

experience.description: Built and maintained the frontend for a real estate platform in Madrid.
highlights: Testing React with Jest and Enzyme
API calls with Apollo Client and GraphQL
Created and maintained components library with Storybooks
Agile SCRUM methodology

experience.description: Founded a web design agency, delivering 30+ projects for clients.
highlights: UX/UI Design for all kinds of websites
More than 30 projects developed
Producing products that are user-friendly, effective, and appealing
Custom content management systems on demand

projects.name: CV Bot

highlights: Built with React + TypeScript + Vercel AI SDK
Configurable LLM provider and tone
Tool-calling architecture for structured data retrieval

Successfully deployed to mainnet

cryptoExperience.summary: Active crypto user since 2017. Started by buying first tokens and exploring the technology, then went deep — co-creating a DeFi yield platform for a DAO that reached $1M TVL on mainnet. Uses a Trezor hardware wallet for long-term holdings since 2020. Regularly bridges assets cross-chain and believes interoperability is one of the most important challenges in the blockchain space.
activities: Co-created Ballena.io DeFi platform reaching $1M TVL (2020-2022)
Uses Trezor hardware wallet since 2020 for long-term self-custody
Regularly bridges assets cross-chain (Across Protocol and similar bridges)
Has staked, farmed, and provided liquidity on multiple chains
Built NFT collections, staking UIs, and farming interfaces professionally
opinions: Interoperability and cross-chain bridging are essential for blockchain adoption
Self-custody is non-negotiable — hardware wallets are the gold standard for securing assets
Good wallet UX matters enormously — most wallets still make simple tasks feel complex
EVM and Solana are fundamentally different: EVM's account model vs Solana's program model changes how you think about state, transactions, and wallet interactions
Open source is the backbone of crypto — trust requires transparency
